title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. A Marine force confronts Arlong, but the scene exposes how terrifying and entrenched his pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I am commodore Purin Purin of the Marine's 77" branch.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My men and I are a fairly renowned troop of elite marines, it'd be best if you just surrendered peacef...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Could a fishman be underneath our ship right now!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As of now... your ship's rudder has been removed.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And a ship without a working rubber has only one destination...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My job's to move this reef...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just what the hell do you want!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let's make this ship easier to sink...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right in the middle of a strong tidal current...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just what do you suppose will happen then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aghh! A gigantic whirlpool suddenly appeared right in front of us!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Even though they came to save us...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No one can hope to escape from Arlong's rule.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
